decisions.format_shape: AUTHOR OK'd: keep `from` a single string (e.g. 'Maria and Tomas'); add optional writers:[...]. Additive optional field, token seed (from-string) UNCHANGED, SPEC stays 0.1, existing fixtures byte-identical. Same pattern as encryption/media.
decisions.voices: AUTHOR OK'd: merged voice default (one letter, two names); offer an 'alternating turns' mode that inserts labelled turns as plain text.
decisions.token_break: DEFERRED: the three-way token break (two keeper halves) is Step 3, a /token-lab decision on rendered visual evidence — NOT in this ledger. Co-written letters authenticate on the existing 2-half token meanwhile.

chunks.notes: DONE. FORMAT EVENT (one sitting): manifest.js buildManifest emits optional writers[] (after `to`, seed untouched); test-manifest.js co-written case (writers carried, from drives seed/ID, stays 0.1, omitted when absent); SPEC.md §3 note + docs/spec/manifest-schema.md writers row; decisions.md entry; spec-sync check (fixtures byte-identical). Verify: node --check js/manifest.js; test-manifest green; all 6 suites green. Idempotent: writers row in schema + writers in buildManifest.

DONE. landing.js co-written UI: setup gains 'We are writing this together' -> second writer field; state.secondWriter; seal fields set from=combined string + writers[]; merged default + alternating-turns mode (labelled turns inserted as plain text). index.html + landing.css + landing.js. Verify: node --check landing/landing.js. Idempotent: #setup-cowrite present.

QA browser: co-written seal -> manifest writers[] present, from combined, from drives ID; alternating turns render; single-writer unaffected (no writers key). PROGRESS.md + plan Task 5 steps 1-2 ticked (step 3 token deferred) + vault. Verify in-browser. Idempotent: PROGRESS notes co-written format+compose done.

resume_hint: Start c1-format (the writers[] format event, one sitting). Then c2-compose, c3-qa. Token three-way break (Step 3) is DEFERRED to a /token-lab session, not part of this job.
